name: clubtt-lentilly
description: Espace documentaire Lentilly Tennis de Table

scripts.build: python scripts/build_index.py --prod && npm run build:css && python scripts/build_dist.py
scripts.lint: uv run --extra dev ruff check . && uv run --extra dev ruff format --check .
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.check: npm run verify && npm run build
